problem: CLI ticket status display shows raw ticket.status (e.g., 'PREVIEW_READY') with no indication of peer approval state. No CLI commands exist for peer approval workflow.

files.why: printTicketDetail (lines 46-83) displays ticket.status (line 52), mergeQueueStatus (lines 57-59), and runs. No approval request data is fetched or displayed. TicketDetail type (lines 5-22) has no approval field.
cmdTicketsList (lines 38-107) displays ticket.status padded to 12 chars (line 105). TicketItem type (lines 5-12) has no approval field. No approval indicator in list output.
Ticket subcommand definitions (lines 43-148). No approval-related subcommands exist.

facts: TicketDetail type in get.ts (lines 5-22) has status, mergeQueueStatus, but no approval-related fields.
TicketItem type in list.ts (lines 5-12) has status but no approval-related fields.
get command displays 'Status: <status>' and optionally 'Merge Status: <mergeQueueStatus>' — no approval indicator.
list command displays status padded to 12 chars — no approval indicator.
No CLI commands exist for submitting defense, approving, or viewing approval requests.
CLI scripts: build='tsc', typecheck='tsc --noEmit', test='tsc && node --test dist/**/*.test.js'.
unknowns: Whether CLI needs full approval commands (submit defense, approve, respond) or just display of approval status.
Whether approval status should come from a new field on the ticket list/detail API response or require a separate API call.
